---
title: "Projects"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
editor: source
---

## Overview

This page showcases selected geospatial and remote sensing projects developed during my Master of Geomatics for Environmental Management at the University of British Columbia.

These projects demonstrate experience in:

-   Geographic Information Systems (GIS)
-   Remote sensing
-   Spatial analysis
-   Reproducible geospatial workflows using R and Quarto

## Selected Projects

:::::: columns
::: {.column width="33%"}
[![](images/cover-page.jpg){.gallery-img}](agriculture.html)

### [Agricultural Landscape Transitions](agriculture.html)

Harmonized land-cover analysis of agricultural change in the Lower Fraser Valley.
:::

::: {.column width="33%"}
[![](images/forest-agric.png){.gallery-img}](lidar.html)

### [LiDAR Tree Detection](lidar.html)

Forest structure analysis using canopy height models and tree segmentation.
:::

::: {.column width="33%"}
[![](images/harmonized_maps.png){.gallery-img}](hyperspectral.html)

### [Hyperspectral Vegetation Analysis](hyperspectral.html)

Spectral interpretation of vegetation classes using hyperspectral reflectance data.
:::
::::::
